pullRequest.title: [DOM-55953] Test fix: view extended search results when searching for projects

nodes.body: I'm a little confused. How is it possible to have more than one project with the same name?
The project name is `project-{nonce}`, and the search tokenizer splits on the `-` so it finds all projects with "project" in the name 🤦
Can we maybe just use {SCENARIO_ID} in the input? So only the {nonce} part. I fear this change in test may hide potential search bugs
The point of this test is to see if the project is searchable by the given user, it is not a test of the search functionality itself.  That should be covered elsewhere.
Also this is a pretty new test (merged last week?), we are not reducing coverage we had historically with this change.
